'''√r-b-g''' ('''karabag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuntfuck|cuntfuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuntfuck|cuntfuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| karabag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirabag || jirabag || shirabag || kirabag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurabag || jujurabag || shushurabag || kukurabag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurabag || jurabag || shurabag || kurabag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurabag || jurabag || shurabag || kurabag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therabag || jerabag || sherabag || kerabag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorabag || jojorabag || shoshorabag || kokorabag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorabag || jorabag || shorabag || korabag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorabag || jorabag || shorabag || korabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rabag || rabag || rabag || rabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rabag || rabag || rabag || rabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rabag || rabag || rabag || rabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rabag || rabag || rabag || rabag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærabag || jærabag || shærabag || kærabag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharabag || jajarabag || shasharabag || kakarabag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharabag || jarabag || sharabag || karabag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharabag || jarabag || sharabag || karabag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharabag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharabag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharabag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharabagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharabagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharabagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharabagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharabagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharabagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharabagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharabagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharabagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharabagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharabagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharabagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharabagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharabagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharabagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharabagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharabagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharabagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharabagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharabagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharabagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharabagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharabagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharabagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharabagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharabagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharabagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharabagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharabagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharabagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharabagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharabagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharabagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharabagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharabagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharabagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharabagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharabagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharabagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharabagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharabagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharabagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharabagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharabagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharabagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharabagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharabagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharabagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharabagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharabagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharabagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharabagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharabagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharabagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharabagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharabagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharabagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharabagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharabagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharabagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
